title: Peek-CLI: let coding agents see your browser
abstract: Hey, fellow programmers! Show HN: Meet Peek-CLI, your coding sidekick peeking into your browser. Imagine code sprites dancing on your screen—magical, isn't it? More than just a tool, Peek-CLI makes coding more fun and relatable. Give it a try!
abstract_zh: 嘿，各位程序员小伙伴们！Show HN：来一款新奇玩意——Peek-CLI，让你的编程小助手直接窥视你的浏览器。想象一下，代码精灵在你的屏幕上跳动，就像《哈利·波特》里的魔法石一样神奇！这不仅仅是一个工具，它让编码变得更有趣、更接近生活。快来试试吧！
